title: Iter Sidecar v3
description: Per-(node, iter) invocation record. v3 adds thinking / tool_streaming_outputs / schema_version / error fields (ADR: single-source-streaming-state D1). streaming_text is no longer cleared on finalize (D2). All new fields are optional — v2 sidecars still validate against v3.

schema_version.description: Schema version marker. v3+ writers always emit 3. Absent on legacy v2 sidecars (read as v2).

status.description: D7 lifecycle state. Legacy sidecars default to 'completed' (write-time).

last_seq.description: D7 sync point: event_bus seq at last flush. WS reconnect uses since_seq = last_seq. Also used by frontend setHydratedNodeTextCursor to dedup text/thinking/tool_output_delta replays (ADR D6).

streaming_text.description: Accumulated agent.text_delta. v3: NO LONGER cleared on finalize (ADR D2) — preserved as the agent's natural-language stream alongside the structured output_result.

thinking.description: v3 NEW. Accumulated agent.thinking_delta (reasoning content). Empty string when agent produced no thinking.

output_result.description: Agent output (any shape). Null until node.completed. Used as agent message content by build_conversation (structured, authoritative).

output.description: Legacy alias for output_result. Pre-v2 sidecars use this; kept for read compat.

tool_streaming_outputs.description: v3 NEW. Maps tool_call_id → accumulated partial output (bash stdout/stderr). Used to populate ConversationMessage.toolStreamingOutput so refresh preserves bash streaming output. Empty object when no streaming tools ran.

todo_steps.description: O1: per-iter todo steps filtered from snapshot.todo_states[node] by iteration === iter.

error.description: v3 NEW (formalizes writer drift — v2 writer emitted this without schema listing). Set by mark_failed; null on completed/interrupted.

backend.description: v3.1 NEW. Executor backend name ('claude-code' / 'pydantic-ai' / future 'opencode' etc.). Persisted from builder._node_dispatch_info so the frontend can render the backend badge during REPLAY (not just live WS). Null on sidecars written before this field was added — UI degrades to no-badge.

tools_resolved.description: v3.1 NEW. Per-tool resolution info from BaseExecutor.resolve_tools(). Each entry: {declared, resolved, source}. Mirrors node.started WS payload. Null on old sidecars — UI falls back to declared names only.

declared.description: Tool name as declared in workflow.json.

resolved.description: Tool name the backend actually sees (e.g. 'Bash', 'mcp__harness__ask_user').

source.description: Source category ('Claude built-in' / 'harness MCP' / 'pydantic-ai function' / 'external MCP' / 'unknown').

tool_call_id.description: pydantic-ai ToolCallPart.tool_call_id — used by frontend to match tool_result to tool_call when parallel same-name calls exist. Optional: legacy sidecars pre-fix omit it.
